title: MISO Load Forecast CSV download
description:
MISO total mid-term load forecast (MTLF) for the current and future days resampled
to 5 minute intervals.

[Guide to data](https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Daily%20Forecast%20and%20Actual%20Load%20by%20Local%20Resource%20Zone_Daily%20Forecast%20and%20Actual%20Load%20Report%20by%20Local%20Resource%20Zone%20Report%20Readers%20Guide.pdf)
